description: You are a commercial interior designer working on a new premium 'Wash & Chill' laundromat in a leased commercial space. Design a functional, high-density commercial laundromat layout within the existing building shell. The layout must include an enclosed back-of-house utility room with at least two partition walls and one door, and at least four named functional zones (e.g., 'Wash Floor', 'Lounge', 'Utility', 'Folding'). Incorporate a high-density equipment bank of at least 20 large appliances, a customer folding and waiting area with at least four tables and eight seating items, and at least two dimension lines annotating aisle clearances for ADA accessibility. Save the completed layout to /home/ga/Documents/laundromat.sh3d.
